title: WITHDRAWN: Comparative Safety of Fibrate Drugs: a Pharmacovigilance Study of Fenofibrate and Gemfibrozil
author_string: Song, J., Dou, C.-Y., Chen, X.-M., Hu, J., Xu, F. et al.
abstract: Withdrawal StatementThe authors have withdrawn this manuscript because We request withdrawal as the current version is incomplete and requires additional experimental data. Therefore, the authors do not wish this work to be cited as reference for the project. If you have any questions, please contact the corresponding author.
